items.title: Contact Pet Share
items.description: Send a general question to the master inbox.

successMessage.headline: Message sent
successMessage.message: Your message made it through the chew-proof tunnel.

errorMessage.headline: The dog ate the email
errorMessage.message: Something went wrong while sending. Please try again.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: We will only use this to reply about your inquiry.

items.title: Ask About This Pet
items.description: Tell us why this temporary pet stay is a good fit.

successMessage.headline: Tail wags confirmed
successMessage.message: Your message made it through the chew-proof tunnel and is headed straight for the master inbox.

errorMessage.headline: The dog ate the email
errorMessage.message: Your request did not make it to the master inbox. Please try again.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email
fields.helpText: We will only use this to reply about your pet inquiry.

items.title: Pet Warranty Claim
items.description: Report a pet incident with the seriousness it absolutely does not deserve.

successMessage.headline: Claim filed
successMessage.message: Your warranty claim has entered the tiny clipboard system.

errorMessage.headline: The claim form escaped
errorMessage.message: We could not file the claim. Please try again before the evidence gets fluffier.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Incident summary
fields.helpText: Please avoid legal terminology unless the pet started it.
